sections.name: Hero with Booking CTA
sections.description: Full-viewport hero with salon name, tagline, hero image background, and prominent 'Book Appointment' button

sections.name: Services Grid
sections.description: 3-column responsive grid showing Hair, Skincare, Nail Art, Bridal, Massage, Makeup services with icons, description, price range

sections.name: Gallery
sections.description: Masonry-style image gallery showcasing transformations and salon interior — 12 placeholder images

sections.name: Client Testimonials
sections.description: Carousel of 5-star reviews with client name, avatar, review text, star rating, and Google review badge

sections.name: About Us
sections.description: Salon story, years of experience badge, team photo, awards

sections.name: Contact with Map
sections.description: Two-column layout — left: contact form (name, phone, service, preferred date), right: embedded Google Map, address, hours, phone

sections.name: Footer
sections.description: Logo, quick links, social media icons (Instagram, Facebook, WhatsApp), copyright, city/address

features: Online booking form with email confirmation
SEO optimized (meta tags, OG tags, sitemap)
